title: Mirroring Items between board. Need help!
excerpt: I am trying to mirror an item between boards at the click of a button. The 2nd board needs to only show select information. Subitems need to be included as well. I figured out how to duplicate and move the item with a bu…

posts.author: dcowan (Dalton Cowan)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to mirror an item between boards at the click of a button. The 2nd board needs to only show select information. Subitems need to be included as well. I figured out how to duplicate and move the item with a button, but it assigns it a new work order number and I need it to just mirror it.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dcowan - it is not possible to mirror subitems at this time. The mirroring of the items is possible by just adding a connect board column (2-way) to the applicable boards, then add mirror columns for the required data from each board.

If you need subitems - you could look into VLOOKUP Auto-Link as it does support copying of data including subitems. Otherwise you may need to look into make.com or other 3rd party to build this.

If you need more information on Connect Boards & Mirroring you can check out the below article:
The Connect Boards Column – Support (monday.com)

Thanks!
Mark

posts.author: Cherryl_JetPack (Cherryl @ Jetpack)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dcowan ,
Welcome to the community!

You can easily achieve this with VLOOKUP. You can automatically link parent and sub-items to another board.
Here’s an article on how you can easily achieve this: How to manually connect sub-items on monday.com boards

In case you need any assistance with VLOOKUP, please feel free to reach out to our dedicated support team at appsupport@jetpackapps.co. Our team is always happy to help you with any queries or concerns you may have.

Hope this helps!
Cherryl
